steps.title: Substitute the y-coordinate
steps.content:
The intersection point has $y=17$, so substitute $17$ for $y$ in both equations.
$-x-17w=-255$
$2x-17w=51$

steps.title: Eliminate the x-term
steps.content:
Double the first equation and add it to the second equation.
$-2x-34w=-510$
$2x-17w=51$
$-51w=-459$
$w=9$
The answer is 9.
